# Skill: Requirement Gap Check

## When to use
Use before implementation or automation generation to avoid ambiguous outputs.

## Checklist
- Are all acceptance criteria measurable?
- Are edge cases explicitly covered?
- Are non-functional constraints stated (performance/security)?
- Are external dependencies named?
- Are failure behaviors defined?

## Output format
- `critical-gaps`
- `recommended-clarifications`
- `ready-for-next-stage` (true/false)
